troop_type_counter.description: Rock-paper-scissors counter system between troop types. Each type takes -20% damage from its counter.

Tank.effect: Tanks receive -20% damage from Missile Vehicles

Missile_Vehicle.effect: Missile Vehicles receive -20% damage from Aircraft

troop_type_counter.counter_cycle: Tank beats Missile Vehicle → Missile Vehicle beats Aircraft → Aircraft beats Tank
troop_type_counter.strategic_note: Always scout enemy troop type before attacking. A 20% damage reduction is a significant disadvantage in close matchups.

formation_bonuses.description: Deploying heroes of the same troop type grants stat bonuses to HP, Attack and Defense.

3_same_type.condition: Deploy 3 heroes of the same type

3_plus_2_mixed.condition: Deploy 3 heroes of one type and 2 of another

4_same_type.condition: Deploy 4 heroes of the same type

5_same_type.condition: Deploy 5 heroes of the same type (full mono)
5_same_type.note: Maximum bonus. This is the target formation for competitive play.

formation_bonuses.priority_order: Always aim for 5 same type (+20%) as the primary goal. If not possible, 3+2 mixed (+10%) is better than 4 same (+15%) only when the 2 off-type heroes are significantly stronger.
formation_bonuses.strategic_note: The +20% formation bonus applies to ALL heroes in the squad, making it one of the highest-impact optimisations available. Never sacrifice this bonus without a very strong reason.

combined_advice: Full mono-type squad (5 same) = +20% stats AND no counter disadvantage if type is chosen correctly
Scout enemy before attack — if they run Tank, use Aircraft for counter advantage + formation bonus
The counter system (-20% damage taken) stacks with formation bonuses, making type advantage matchups very one-sided
For PvP: always consider both formation bonus AND type counter before committing to an attack
For boss fights: troop type counter still applies — check boss type and match accordingly
